title: Chef Aid 20cm Non-Stick Square Cake Tin, Carbon Steel Cake pan with Even Heat Distribution, Ideal for All Cake Styles and Perfect for Traditional Tray Bakes of Lasagne or Shepherds Pie
features: KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: This Chef Aid Square Cake Pan is a versatile and multi-use pan and ideal for baking all styles of cakes and can also be used for traditional tray bakes like lasagne and cottage pies
NON-STICK: This Chef Aid Square Cake Pan comes with high grade Goldflon non-stick coating for effortless quick and easy release
FAMILY SIZED: With internal measurements of 18.2 x 18.2 x 4.8 cm and external measurements of 23 x 22 x 5 cm, this baking tin will serve the Family with your chosen bake
QUALITY MATERIALS: This baking tin is made of high-quality carbon steel making it very durable and ideal for everyday use; BPA-free, PFOA-free and PTFE-free

CHEF AID: The Chef Aid non-stick cookware range is a well-loved and very popular range of 25 products that caters for every individual and offers a complete range of solutions for the home and is ideal for everyday use
